name: Innovation Hubs (iHubs)
description: A collaborative innovation space that helps nascent startups, students, researchers, and MSMEs develop ideas, build skills, access resources, and prepare for incubation.
main_role: Serves as a pre-incubator that bridges early-stage innovators to Technology Business Incubators (TBIs) and strengthens the regional startup ecosystem.
vision: To be the leading STI Center for collaboration and innovation towards impactful solutions for sustainable economic growth.
mission: To attain an innovative startup ecosystem by providing collaborative spaces and access to resources.
objectives: Promote innovation culture in the regions
Increase the number of nascent startups
Promote the commercialization of R&D outputs
key_services: Endorsement or matching to suitable TBIs
Support for commercialization of R&D outputs

Initiate: Matching with suitable Technology Business Incubator

facilities.creative_space: For brainstorming, casual collaboration, and small group discussions
facilities.huddle_space: For meetings, workshops, and collaborative sessions
facilities.research_nook: With computers and access to research tools

governance.regional_director: Provides overall leadership and strategic direction
governance.advisory_council: Recommends strategies and gives guidance on major initiatives
governance.pstds: Facilitate setup, identify location, and build partnerships
governance.savants: Validate startup ideas in areas such as finance, marketing, and industry trends
governance.sages: Organize activities, guide startups, and connect with universities, colleges, and TBIs
governance.prefect: Handles daily operations, supports users, and monitors resources

operational_policies.access: Open to students, researchers, and nascent startups with valid ID
operational_policies.operating_hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
operational_policies.support_available: Prefect or help desk during operating hours
